name: anyblox
claim: embed a WebAssembly decoder so readers can consume previously unknown formats

attempts.entrypoint: official bundler and anyblox2csv Cargo targets
attempts.workload: build the VLDB 2025 reproducibility artifact with all submodules
attempts.result: vendored Vortex code required unversioned nightly Rust features; stable Rust failed with E0554/E0599

retry_when: the artifact pins a reproducible nightly toolchain or builds on stable Rust
